name: J1939TestRequestACL
title: J1939TestRequestACL
syntax: long J1939TestRequestACL( dword requestSA, dbNode aclSender, dword timeout, dword options )
description: A request for ACL is sent. The configured node must respond with the ACL message (0xEE00).

parameters.name: requestSA
parameters.description: the request is sent from this source address

parameters.name: options
parameters.description: Bit 1: specific request Bit 2: not configured nodes are allowed to send ACL Bit 3: node may use another address than defined in NmStationAddress

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
